ask: How do I reset my password?
paraphrase: how can I reset my password?
note: paraphrase pair measured at cosine 0.937 in the ADR-023 sweep — deterministically above the 0.75 threshold

ask: How do I set up MFA for my account?
note: plain knowledge contract: citations + Sources list, fresh (not cached). No cache half — inventing new paraphrase pairs by eye is how thresholds get vibed

ask: how do I pair my Bluetooth keyboard
note: seeded negative space (retrieval.jsonl bluetooth-keyboard-pairing): must refuse, offer a ticket, carry zero citations, and never be cached. stage1: top_cos 0.388 fails the 0.45 gate, so zero citations is asserted

ask: set up my work email on my smartwatch
note: second refusal probe, the ADR-017 near-miss case (email-on-PHONE article exists): the refusal slice of e2e stops being a single coin flip. STAGE-2 refusal (0.611 clears the gate): the adjacent email-on-phone articles legitimately appear as citations ('retrieved sources'), so zero-citations is NOT asserted here — see the flow docstring

messages: I'd like a Tableau Creator license please.
Yes, confirmed — business justification: 'sales pipeline dashboards for Q3'. Use my defaults for everything else.
note: $840 > $500 HITL threshold: run must END with the order submitted/pending; approve from a fresh client -> submitted/approved

messages: Please order a corporate iPhone for me.
Yes, confirmed — business justification: 'on-call rotation requires a corporate device'. Use my defaults for everything else.
note: $999 > $500: same pending contract, reject path -> cancelled/rejected. OS-independent item on purpose (AutoCAD was measured failing here correctly: windows-only vs the demo user's mac)

messages: Please order the 1080p webcam from the catalog for me.
Yes, confirmed — use my defaults for any form fields and place the order now.
note: $95 <= $500: the OTHER half of the ADR-020 gate — places in one run (submitted/not_required, no approval round-trip) and form_values must honor the item's form_schema (declared fields only, required filled)

message: Please order an AutoCAD license for me.
note: windows-only item vs the demo user's mac: NO order row in any state — the incompatibility surfaces in conversation instead (measured behaving this way in M4)

message: Please raise the priority of my existing 'Wi-Fi keeps dropping' ticket to high — it's blocking me all day now.
note: update_ticket path on the user's OWN seeded ticket; the flow restores the row afterwards. Ordered BEFORE multi_intent so no second wifi ticket exists yet to mis-target

report: Nothing is printing from the shared printer on our floor, it shows as offline for me too. Please report it — if there's already a ticket for this, just add me to it, no need to check with me first.
link_targets: Nothing prints from the shared printer
note: near-duplicate of seeded OPEN printer outage tickets: expect a comment on any of them, no new ticket. Phrasing pre-authorizes the action: without it the agent was observed (1 of 2 runs) describing the duplicate without writing the comment

report: When I sign in through SSO it just bounces me back to the login page in a loop. Please report this — if there's already an open ticket for the SSO problem, just add my report to it, no need to ask first.
note: second link probe, shared-infrastructure group (7 seeded open tickets): the link-vs-create pair stops being a single observation

report: My laptop fan is roaring constantly and the machine got hot enough that it shut itself down twice today. Please open a ticket.
note: no seeded thermal/fan group exists: expect exactly one new ticket, owned by the acting user, embedded at creation

report: My desk phone's screen is completely dead even after unplugging it and plugging it back in. Please open a ticket for it.
note: second create probe, fresh domain (no seeded desk-phone group): pairs with the SSO link probe above

report: The badge reader at the 3rd floor entrance beeps three times and rejects my badge every time. Please open a ticket.
note: identity isolation as a NON-demo user: the ticket must land under avery's user_id, not the suite default — the user_tools DESIGN NOTE asserted for a second identity

ask: How do I install the Salesforce desktop app?
accept: Yes please, go ahead and open a ticket for it.
note: the knowledge->incident edge (ADR-022) as product: refusal offers a ticket, acceptance in the SAME session creates one (right owner, embedded) — and none exists before acceptance. STAGE-1 probe by design (retrieval.jsonl salesforce-install negative space; this phrasing measured top_cos 0.421, below the 0.45 gate) so the refusal is deterministic at the tool level and the flow tests the EDGE, not the refusal coin flip: the old E-505 probe sat at 0.460 — 0.01 over the gate, pure ADR-017 stage-2 judgment — and flipped to an answer in the 2026-07-11 nightly (the gray band stays covered by the retrieval refusal slice, where it is a measured RATE, not a hard gate). Fresh domain, no seeded salesforce ticket group — the old printer-topic ordering constraint vs incident_link is gone

message: The office wifi keeps dropping on my laptop every few minutes — please report that to IT for me. Also, what's the company policy on installing personal software on my work laptop?
nudge: Thanks — now the second part of my question please: what is the policy on installing personal software on my work laptop?
note: two domains in one message: the incident half must ACT (ticket or comment — demo owns an open wifi ticket, linking is correct), the knowledge half must answer, with one bounded nudge allowed (specialists return to the router on topic change)

mention: Quick heads up: I've switched machines — my work laptop is a Windows 11 Dell XPS now. Anyway, how do I reset my password?
recall: I need to set up the VPN on my work laptop — which setup guide applies to me? Please walk me through it.
note: the ADR-031 loop: fact extracted in session A (user_facts row = the hard side effect), used in a FRESH session B. Acts as a fact-less non-demo user so seeded facts stay untouched. Session B is deliberately a KB task the fact PERSONALIZES (VPN guide: macOS vs Windows — the injected 'Windows 11 Dell XPS' fact must pick the Windows guide): the first post-merge CI nightly showed that a bare 'what OS do I use?' probe collides with the knowledge agent's ADR-017 grounding contract (answer ONLY from the KB) — it used the fact in all four local runs, then correctly refused the non-KB question in CI. Probe-design bug, fixed in the probe

mention: For context on this conversation: my project code is ZEPHYR-42. With that noted — how do I set an out of office reply?
recall: What project code did I mention earlier in this conversation?
note: chat history survives an API restart (ADR-030 — the M2 e2e proved this for order state, this is the chat half): kill + respawn the suite-owned server mid-session, then recall a turn-1 token

ask: How do I report a phishing email?
note: M11 (ADR-048): SSE endpoint parity, appended AFTER the original 18 flows (which stay byte-identical — the frozen-contract proof). Knowledge topic chosen away from every other flow's first-turn query (password/MFA/VPN/out-of-office/personal-software all store cache entries earlier in the run) so the stream leg is a real cache MISS and the /chat leg afterwards hits the entry the STREAM stored — write-gate parity, not an accident of ordering
